$schema_note: Machine-readable trigger set for AGENT_INSTRUCTIONS.md. Every level cites a source email in emails/text_md/. Rule: latest email wins; recompute moving-average levels older than 14 days.
price_snapshot_source: analysis/extracted/research-market-levels.md (Jun 11, 2026 close) plus 2026-06-19_153803_My-Summer-Game-Plan; refresh 2026-07-17 IA Trade Alert SPCX $123 double-down + 2026-07-19 unlock floor ~$120 / DCA-layers + BTC diminishing-drawdowns thesis + 2026-07-22 IA Trade Alert MRVL add at $209
hard_rules: Autonomous execution enabled for the assigned Alpaca paper profile only
Notify Samin after every placed/modified/cancelled order
Log every scheduled check in analysis/check-log.md and every order/no-trade decision in analysis/trade-journal.md
Options/LEAPS/covered calls enabled by Samin on 2026-06-12; never create debt, margin debit, naked/undefined option risk, perps, or crypto perpetual exposure

InvestAnswers TRADE_ALERT emails are priority signal; follow fresh alerts at our scale when they match our portfolio, valid trigger levels, and no-debt guardrails; revalidate instead of chasing stale fills
Max 2 new autonomous opening trades per rolling 7 days unless risk-reducing
Never buy above the buy zone — watch/alert instead
Every trade cites its trigger + source file

macro_standing_orders.iran_hormuz: Oil headlines drive CPI → Fed → everything. Peace headlines = risk-on; escalation dips INTO buy zones = entries, not exits.
macro_standing_orders.fomc: No new deployment into FOMC days (next: 2026-06-16/17, ~98% hold priced, hikes possible from Sep/Oct).
macro_standing_orders.good_news_is_bad_news: Hot jobs/CPI = yield spike = AI-multiple compression = watch the buy zones.
